svg.title: VibeFinder 2.0 detailed data flow
svg.desc: Step-by-step data flow from raw user input through guardrails, RAG retrieval, weighted scoring, agentic critique loop, and final logged output

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of inputs does VibeFinder accept?')
sendPrompt('What does the guardrails validation step check?')
g.text: type check, range clamp, bad input reject

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the embedding and cosine search work in RAG?')
g.text: embed query, cosine search vector store

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the weighted scoring engine score each candidate?')
g.text: genre, mood, energy, tags, era, popularity

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the agentic critic evaluate and re-rank results?')
g.text: score critique, confidence, re-rank if needed

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What fields are written to the JSON decision log?')
sendPrompt('What does the final recommendation output contain?')
